title: Health Information Technician
description:
Roche is a global healthcare leader in diagnostics and pharmaceuticals. We're committed to advancing personalized healthcare across all therapeutic areas.

We're seeking a Health Information Technician to join our Pharmaceuticals team in Detroit. This role offers the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to our mission while developing your professional skills in a collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Manage and maintain accurate electronic health records
Code diagnoses and procedures for billing and compliance purposes
Ensure data quality and completeness in health information systems
Release medical records in compliance with privacy regulations
Assist with audit activities and regulatory compliance
Support health information system implementation and training

requirements.education: High school diploma; associate's degree in health information technology preferred
requirements.experience_years: 1-2 years in health information management or medical coding
